systemChecks.title: Resend API
systemChecks.description: Email delivery provider. Health status, domain verification, and API key validation monitored in Send Configuration.

systemChecks.title: Environment Variables
systemChecks.description: RESEND_API_KEY, EMAIL_FROM, and other secrets. Masked display with set/unset status in Send Configuration.

systemChecks.title: Error Tracking
systemChecks.description: Every failed delivery is logged with error type, message, and stack trace. Filterable in Delivery Logs.

systemChecks.title: Config Versioning
systemChecks.description: All brand config, urgency settings, and SLA changes are versioned with diffs. Rollback available in Version History.

systemChecks.title: Security Layers
systemChecks.description: Rate limiting, CSRF tokens, honeypot fields, input sanitization, and Zod validation -- all auditable via Security Audit.

systemChecks.title: Delivery Pipeline
systemChecks.description: Form submission -> server action -> email service -> Resend API -> delivery log. Every step is observable.
